title: Wrath & Glory - An Abundance of Apocryphal Adversaries
description:
A bestiary module for the Wrath & Glory system (Cubicle 7), adapting the threats from An Abundance of Apocryphal Adversaries — Nathan Dowdell's homebrew bestiary companion to An Abundance of Apocrypha — converted here with his permission.

Drop ready-to-play enemy stat blocks straight onto your maps: Boyz and Nobz, walkers, psykers, and the galaxy's most notorious Warlords, each with their full weapons, talents, abilities and threat-tier options.

Current content — the Orks faction is complete: 41 threat actors (from Shoota Boyz to Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka) plus a companion items compendium of 19 Adversary Traits and 15 Shiny Gubbinz relics you can drag onto any Ork boss. The other eight factions (Tyranids, Necrons, Daemonic Legions, Heretic Astartes, Asuryani, Drukhari, T'au Empire, and Malicious Miscellany) are on the way.

⚠️ Recommended companions: wng-core (tokens, icons, and the Smite power) and wng-apocrypha (the Ork WAAAGH! psychic powers). The module installs and runs without them, but those icons and linked powers will be missing. Some mounted bosses also reference Church of Steel (wng-cos) for their vehicles.

Warhammer 40,000 and Wrath & Glory are the IP of Games Workshop and Cubicle 7; this is an unofficial, non-commercial fan project.
